launchDefinition.objective: Launch a daily, career-personalized AI newsletter with real cited news, across 3 verticals (Marketing, Product, Founder), with a real rolling-2-week archive and an SEO/social growth engine.
acceptanceCriteria: Every newsletter item links to a real primary source present in the fetched set; zero LLM-invented facts/stats/quotes
Double opt-in gates sending; unguessable unsubscribe + one-click List-Unsubscribe; physical address in footer
Test send lands in Gmail inbox (mail-tester >= 9/10)
15 category hubs server-rendered + in sitemap; variants noindex; signed-in user sees last 14 days
3 categories live; daily send reliable 14 days; complaint rate < 0.10%

brand.tagline: AI news that actually matters to your career — every morning.
brand.voice: Sharp, useful, professional-but-human; tactical over hype; cites its sources

knownIdsOrUrls.posthog: MCP connected (current project: Surgery Viz — likely create new)

growth.paidAdsScope: None at launch; organic + social + SEO. Paid is opt-in later (stop-before paid spend).

preApproved: Seed sends to our own inboxes

blockers: API keys pending (gates Phase 1+, not Phase 0)
Cold sending domain — needs warmup + double opt-in before real broadcast
Exact Pro price ($15-19), seniority-tier labels, X handle naming unconfirmed
